case_title: PHONG, DAN DIEU VS COOPER, TODD B.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, TODD B.
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHONG, DAN DIEU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOPER, TODD B. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PHONG, DAN DIEU AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, TODD B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COOPER, TODD B. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PHONG, DAN DIEU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF PHONG, DAN DIEU
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-15-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-19-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT COOPER, TODD B. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PHONG, DAN DIEU STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
